{{Quote|I am Smada the Hutt! I kill who I want, when I want.|Smada to [[Mammon Hoole]]|<ref name="Galaxy of Fear: Eaten Alive">''[[Galaxy of Fear: Eaten Alive]]''</ref>}}
'''Smada the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]''' was a powerful [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] who employed [[Gank/Legends|Gank]] killers as bodyguards, similar to the way [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] employed [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorreans]].

He and his thugs were killed on the mysterious, flesh eating [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[D'vouran]] while trying to capture a [[Shi'ido]] named [[Mammon Hoole]] and exploit his powers. Smada was captured, along with Hoole's wards [[Zak Arranda/Legends|Zak]] and [[Tash Arranda/Legends|Tash Arranda]], by the [[Enzeen]]. While imprisoned, Smada tried to steal the only method of escape for himself. His escape attempt failed, and he fell into the core of the planet. There, he was digested for thousands of years.
